retry_reason: The function is a no-op when auth is NULL; if auth is non-NULL, the put and free always succeed (no failure path) — retrying is unnecessary.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that releases a reference on the underlying ahash tfm via crypto_free_ahash and frees the atmel_sha_authenc_ctx structure. After this call, the auth pointer is invalid and must not be used. This is the standard destructor for the authenc context; it should be called exactly once when the context is no longer needed.
